title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the countrymen on World Health Day
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the countrymen on World Health Day

Good health is a choice which we can maintain with proper care
On this occasion let us all dedicate ourselves to building a healthy and robust society through adequate care, healthy food habits and regular exercise

Posted On:
07 APR 2026 11:56AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah has extended greetings to the countrymen on
World Health Day
.

In a post on X platform, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah said, “Greetings on World Health Day. Good health is a choice which we can maintain with proper care. On this occasion let us all dedicate ourselves to building a healthy and robust society through adequate care, healthy food habits and regular exercise.”

Greetings on World Health Day. Good health is a choice which we can maintain with proper care. On this occasion let us all dedicate ourselves to building a healthy and robust society through adequate care, healthy food habits and regular exercise.
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 7, 2026

*****

RK / RR / PS

(Release ID: 2249549)
